data.body: PROBE RUN (AC1) 2026-07-15 ~06:50Z. Invocation: python3 $CLAUDE_JOB_DIR/tmp/novelty_probe.py from the repo venv ([agents] extra, live Anthropic calls), reconstructing (round-N advisory findings, round-N-1 surfaced findings) for every post-2026-07-12 remediation-eligible plan_review sidecar and calling rebar.llm.review_kernel.verify.score_novelty with the same run_chunk construction as _score_floor_novelty. Results: 34 eligible pairs found, 34 probed, 0 errors, 0 empty maps. 541 advisory findings scored: novelty min 0.0 / median 0.167 / max 1.0. Carryover discrimination: 0 of 92 same-norm_id carryovers scored >= 0.7 (perfect). Novel findings: 185 of 449 scored >= 0.7. Drop quadrant (novelty >= 0.7 AND priority < 0.4): 115 findings.
